title: Issue en pausa con respuesta humana
body:
## Idea
Un flow ambiguo que quedó esperando input humano.

comments.body:
<!-- claude-cli: flow=explore iter=1 agent=opus role=executor -->
## [executor:opus · iter:1]

**Resumen:** Plan inicial.

---

<details>
<summary>Plan en JSON (para re-procesar)</summary>

```json
{
  "summary": "Plan inicial de la feature.",
  "questions": [{"q":"¿A o B?","why":"Define scope","blocker":true}],
  "risks": [{"risk":"Scope creep","likelihood":"medium","impact":"high","mitigation":"Dry-run primero"}],
  "paths": [
    {"title":"Path A","sketch":"Approach A","pros":["pro1"],"cons":["con1"],"effort":"M","recommended":true},
    {"title":"Path B","sketch":"Approach B","pros":["pro2"],"cons":["con2"],"effort":"S","recommended":false}
  ],
  "next_step": "Resolver preguntas de producto."
}
```

</details>

<!-- claude-cli: flow=explore iter=1 agent=codex instance=1 role=validator -->
## [validator:codex#1 · iter:1 · needs_human]

```json
{
  "verdict": "needs_human",
  "summary": "Preguntas de producto sin resolver",
  "findings": [{"severity":"blocker","area":"questions","where":"questions[0]","issue":"¿Elegimos Path A o Path B?","suggestion":"","needs_human":true}]
}
```

<!-- claude-cli: flow=explore iter=1 agent=gemini instance=1 role=validator -->
## [validator:gemini#1 · iter:1 · approve]

```json
{
  "verdict": "approve",
  "summary": "Plan aceptable",
  "findings": []
}
```

<!-- claude-cli: flow=explore iter=1 role=human-request -->
## 🧑 Input humano requerido

### Preguntas
- **[codex#1 · questions]** ¿Elegimos Path A o Path B?
Vamos con Path A. Path B tiene mucho overhead de mantenimiento y no escala para nuestro caso.
